title: Death note
description: Adds a death note that kills a random player on the server.
body:
Adds a fun tool for pranks on servers!

# 📜 Features
## Death Note

- Single-use item: Disappears after activation.
  
- Random target: Selects any online player (except yourself) when used.
  
- Delayed effect: The chosen player dies after 30 seconds.

## Visual effects:

- Soul particles around both players.
  
- soul_escape sound effects on activation.
  
- Death cannot be prevented (ignores armor and potions).
  
- How to Obtain

Drops from Evokers with a 5% chance (in addition to standard drops).

# 🎯 Usage
## Activation:

- Hold the Death Note → Right-click (RMB).
  
- Soul particles and sound effects will appear.

## Mechanics:

- Once used, the particles swirl around the target.
  
- At 30 seconds → instant death.
  
- If the target leaves the game before the timer ends → effect is canceled.
